recommendedNextStage: Finish local development hardening, rerun the fixed closed-door rubric, then handle exact tags and npm publish as the final release phase

qualityGate.scope: The 2026-06-26 remote Quality Gate P0 was remediated by tracking the create/forge admin-mock .env.example.tpl templates. GitHub Actions Quality Gate run 28234054546 passed on commit 457357f6e3285afdd7f5ed6f496cdf8962fd0183. This supports RC candidate wording, but it is not a 95% global coverage claim, not a final closed-door rescore, and not a publish claim.
qualityGate.scorePolicy: Do not revise numeric scores or use them as GA/release claims until the fixed three-role rubric reruns against the updated evidence, exact release tags point at the final release commit and are pushed, and npm publish evidence exists.

latestRemoteGate.passedSteps: install, build, typecheck, lint, test, core coverage ratchet, packed core API smoke, docs validation, security audit, release gate dry-run
latestRemoteGate.rootCause: create/forge admin-mock .env.example.tpl template files existed locally but were not tracked because .gitignore ignored .env.*
latestRemoteGate.localRemediation: .gitignore allows .env.example.tpl and the two admin-mock template files are tracked in Git; the remediation commit passed the remote Quality Gate.

closedDoorReview.scope: Three-role @stratix/core backend framework risk review after the first and second remediation batches plus local problem 3 / problem 4 remediation evidence; this is a risk score under a fixed rubric, not the local release-gate score and not a global coverage claim.

postProblem34Remediation.scorePolicy: Problem 3 and problem 4 remediation is recorded as evidence only. Composite scores must not change until the same fixed three-role rubric is rerun and cites this changed evidence.
postProblem34Remediation.summary: Root @stratix/core exports are narrowed to stable application APIs; plugin, contracts, diagnostics, experimental, service, and internal APIs are exposed through explicit package subpaths. Request identity, observability, and security bootstrap responsibilities are extracted; AutoDI strict mode rejects anonymous plugins while accepting named plugins; DI graph nodes expose confidence; route contracts support runtime prefixes; config schema no longer uses z.any/catchall(z.any); workspace pack gates validate exported subpath files.
evidence: packages/core/src/index.ts no longer exports bootstrap, plugin/DI runtime helpers, contracts, diagnostics, or internal route registration helpers from the root entrypoint
supported ecosystem packages and generated plugin templates import plugin/DI contracts from @stratix/core/plugin instead of the root API; @stratix/tasks is removed from the workspace
ApplicationBootstrap request identity handling is delegated to packages/core/src/bootstrap/request-identity.ts

ApplicationBootstrap error handling, request context, plugin load ordering, eager initialization, lifecycle shutdown, observability, and security hook installers are delegated to focused bootstrap modules
route contracts can include runtime prefixes and DI graph nodes carry explicit/inferred/unknown confidence
packages/core/src/config/schema.ts validates typed autoLoad, plugin functions, observability providers, rate-limit providers, and Fastify server extensions without z.any/catchall(z.any)
packages/forge workspace release pack validation includes package exports import/types subpath files
packages/forge project and workspace release gate docs checks reuse pnpm run docs:validate instead of invoking uvx directly
packages/core/scripts/smoke-packed-api.mjs installs the packed tarball into a temporary consumer project and imports documented subpaths
packages/core/package.json lists pino-pretty as a runtime dependency because the default development logger transport loads it

releaseSurface.assessment: Supported package manifest versions, public package metadata, tarball/API/docs/security gates, workspace release-surface checks, remote Quality Gate run 28234054546, and public npmjs exact-version availability are aligned for the 10 remaining public packages at RC-candidate level. @stratix/tasks has been physically removed from the workspace, presets, lockfile importer, release gate exclusions, and publish surface. As of 2026-06-26, exact versions are still unpublished on public npmjs, exact tags must point at the final release commit and be pushed to origin, and npm publish evidence is still pending before GA/public release wording.

quality.summary: remote Quality Gate passed on commit 457357f6e3285afdd7f5ed6f496cdf8962fd0183
quality.reason: The remediation commit includes the tracked create/forge admin-mock .env.example.tpl templates and completed install, build, typecheck, lint, supported tests, core coverage ratchet, packed core API smoke, docs validation, security audit, and release gate dry-run.

The remote checkout missed packages/create/templates/presets/admin-mock/files/.env.example.tpl and packages/forge/templates/presets/admin-mock/files/.env.example.tpl because .gitignore ignored .env.*.
